    • listDocuments

      public InvestorCommunicationServiceListDocumentsResponse listDocuments(Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<String> filter) throws Exception
      List Documents List documents that match search parameters.
      Specified by:
      listDocuments in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallInvestorCommunicationServiceListDocuments
      Parameters:
      pageSize - The maximum number of items to return; The service may return fewer than this value
      pageToken - Token used to get a specific page of results
      filter - CEL filter to be applied against the documents; Providing a correspondent to search for is required; Only one correspondent can be searched at a time
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
